executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体偏弱，主要是 GitHub Changelog 的产品更新；其中真正对工程负责人有较高信号的是 Copilot cloud agent 的企业级灰度控制能力。
这次更新的核心价值不在模型能力，而在组织采用路径：GitHub 现在支持按组织选择性启用 cloud agent，并提供 API，便于做试点、分阶段推广与治理。
其余候选多为聚合页或通用更新列表，技术深度和新增信息有限，不足以构成完整日报。
executive_summary_en: The candidate set is weak overall and mostly consists of GitHub Changelog updates; the only clearly high-signal item for engineering leaders is the new enterprise rollout control for Copilot cloud agent.

The value here is not model capability but organizational adoption mechanics: GitHub now supports selective enablement of the cloud agent per organization, with APIs for piloting, staged rollout, and governance.
The remaining candidates are mostly archive or index pages with limited new technical content, so this does not justify a full digest.

items.title: Enable Copilot cloud agent via custom properties - GitHub Changelog
items.summary_zh: GitHub 允许企业管理员按组织选择性启用 Copilot cloud agent，而不再只能全开、全关或完全下放给组织自行决定。新功能支持通过 AI Controls 页面或 REST API 管理，并可结合 organization custom properties 进行初始筛选。
items.summary_en: GitHub now lets enterprise admins selectively enable Copilot cloud agent for specific organizations instead of only using all-on, all-off, or org-decides modes. The feature is manageable through the AI Controls page or new REST API endpoints, and can use organization custom properties for initial targeting.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这类能力直接影响 AI coding agent 在大企业中的落地速度。对平台与工程治理负责人来说，真正的难点通常不是“能不能用”，而是如何安全地做试点、限定范围、逐步扩张，并保留审计与策略控制。这次更新提供了一个更实际的 adoption control plane。
items.why_it_matters_en: This directly affects how AI coding agents get deployed inside large enterprises. For platform and engineering governance leaders, the hard problem is rarely raw capability; it is how to pilot safely, constrain blast radius, expand gradually, and preserve policy control. This update adds a more practical adoption control plane.
key_takeaways_zh: 新增策略模式：可只对选定组织启用 Copilot cloud agent，支持渐进式 rollout。
提供 3 个 REST API 端点用于设定策略、加入启用列表、移出启用列表，便于平台自动化接入。
custom properties 只在配置时评估一次，后续属性变化不会自动重新计算启用状态，这对治理自动化设计很关键。
key_takeaways_en: A new policy mode enables Copilot cloud agent only for selected organizations, supporting staged rollout.
Three REST API endpoints are provided to set policy state, add organizations to the enabled list, and remove organizations from it, making platform automation easier.
Custom properties are evaluated only once at configuration time; later property changes do not automatically recompute enablement, which matters for governance automation design.

top_items: Enable Copilot cloud agent via custom properties - GitHub Changelog
themes_zh: AI 编程代理的企业级灰度发布
平台治理先于全面采用
开发者工具正在补齐组织控制面
themes_en: Enterprise staged rollout for AI coding agents
Developer tooling is adding organizational control planes
implications_zh: 如果你在推动 AI coding agent 落地，组织级选择性启用会比全局开关更适合先做高信任团队试点。
平台团队应把该能力接入内部自动化与审批流，而不是仅依赖控制台手工配置。
由于 custom properties 不是持续动态求值，若要实现真正的策略即代码，需要额外的同步与校验机制。
implications_en: If you are rolling out AI coding agents, selective org-level enablement is a better fit than global toggles for piloting with high-trust teams first.
Platform teams should integrate this capability into internal automation and approval workflows instead of relying only on manual console configuration.
Because custom properties are not continuously re-evaluated, teams that want true policy-as-code behavior will need extra synchronization and validation logic.
reading_order: Enable Copilot cloud agent via custom properties - GitHub Changelog
what_to_ignore_zh: GitHub Changelog 的聚合页、年度归档页和月度归档页基本是索引，不提供额外技术信息。
同一批 changelog 中的通用产品更新若没有实现细节、接口变化或治理意义，可暂时忽略。
what_to_ignore_en: The GitHub Changelog landing page and archive pages are mostly index pages and add little technical value beyond navigation.
Generic product updates from the same changelog batch can be ignored unless they include implementation details, API changes, or governance implications.
